entity.summary: Thailand-based regulated centralized digital-asset exchange founded in February 2018 and publicly operating from May 9, 2018.
entity.notes: Official company material distinguishes Bitkub's February 2018 founding from the exchange's May 9, 2018 operating milestone.

expected.summary: Thailand-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bitkub brand.

changes.summary: Thailand-based regulated centralized digital-asset exchange founded in February 2018 and publicly operating from May 9, 2018.
changes.notes: Official company material distinguishes Bitkub's February 2018 founding from the exchange's May 9, 2018 operating milestone.

events.title: Bitkub exchange began operating
events.description: Bitkub began operating its Thai cryptocurrency exchange service on May 9, 2018.
events.notes: Official first-anniversary material identifies May 9, 2018 as the exchange operating milestone; the company itself was founded in February 2018.

evidence.title: About Bitkub
evidence.notes: Official company page states that Bitkub was founded in February 2018.

evidence.title: Today is Bitkub.com's first anniversary
evidence.notes: Official anniversary article looks back to May 9, 2018 as the exchange operating milestone.

evidence.title: Bitkub official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitkub identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitkub
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the Bitkub identity, Thailand registration, and 2018 establishment year.
